hero.title: Your pet,
hero.subtitle: Personalized care. Love you can feel.
hero.description: Professional pet care with veterinary and groomer training. One pet at a time, always. Because your best friend deserves the best.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Complete and personalized care for your best friend

items.name: Home Boarding
items.description: Your pet will be our only guest, receiving personalized attention, comfort, and a calm stress-free environment. Discounts and other benefits available.
items.detail: Your pet becomes part of my family during their stay. Transportation is not included — you drop off and pick up your furry friend.
card_includes: Exclusive attention (one pet at a time)
includes: Daily photos and updates so you feel close
Constant supervision (one pet at a time only)
items.ideal: Owners looking for a cozy, calm home environment — no cages, no overcrowding.
items.note: Large/active breeds (husky, pitbull, rottweiler) from $60k · Small calm breeds from $40k
conditions: Price varies if more than one pet
Transportation is charged separately if you need pickup

items.name: In-Home Overnight Care
items.description: I come to your home to care for your pet in the comfort of their own environment. (Transportation not included. Conditions apply.)
items.detail:
This service goes far beyond just "sleeping over". It means absolute and exclusive dedication to your pet throughout the night, ensuring companionship, safety, and their routines in a familiar setting.

Due to the logistics, responsibility, and level of commitment required, this service is subject to specific conditions.
includes: Full availability from dusk to the following morning
Walks, feeding, play, and overnight companionship
Your home cared for with the same commitment
Service fully dedicated to your pets
why_higher: Extended full availability: I stay at your home from dusk to the following morning
Continuous attention: includes walks, feeding, play, companionship, and overnight supervision
Personal exposure and adaptation: being in a different environment implies an additional level of responsibility, trust, and adaptation
Respect for your space: I care for your home with the same seriousness I give to your pet
Exclusive service: during the overnight stay, my time is entirely dedicated to your pets
items.note: Price may vary by number of pets, energy level, or special requirements. Transport not included.
conditions: Booking required at least 2–3 weeks in advance
Subject to prior evaluation and availability
Pets with established routines and stable behavior
items.footer_note: This service reflects not only the care of your pet, but also the commitment, trust, and willingness to adapt to your space so your companion is never alone.

items.name: Visits & Hourly Care
items.description: Need someone to visit your pet during the day? I offer visits for feeding, companionship, walks, playtime, and general care.
items.detail:
Perfect for people who need occasional support without full-time care. Very useful for cats, independent dogs, or when you're out for just a few hours.

A transportation fee applies based on location.
includes: Visits to your home (two or three times a day)
30–45 min walks with water, play, and exercise
Food bowl, water, and litter check (for cats)
items.note: Transportation fee applies based on location.

items.name: Event Pet Companion
items.description: Want your pet to be part of your wedding, birthday, family reunion, or special celebration? I'll care for them during the event so you can enjoy every moment without worrying about walks, needs, hydration, or supervision. Your pet can join you for the important moments — photos, celebrations — while receiving all the attention they need.
items.detail:
Your pet is part of the family and deserves to be present at the most important moments. With this service, you can include your furry friend at weddings, proposals, photo sessions, birthdays, and special events without worrying about their care during the celebration.

I'll be present throughout the event to accompany and supervise your pet, letting you fully enjoy your day while your best friend receives personalized attention, love, and safety.
includes: Support during photos and special moments
Monitoring for stress or discomfort signals
Updates and photos for your peace of mind
items.ideal: Weddings · Proposals · Photo sessions · Birthdays · Family reunions · Pet-friendly social and corporate events
benefits: No need to delegate pet care to family or guests
Your pet participates safely and comfortably
Personalized attention focused on their emotional well-being
items.note: First 2h · $30.000/extra hour · 6h+ or multiple pets: custom quote
conditions: Service provided only during the event
Pet must have up-to-date vaccinations and good health
Prior meet & greet recommended to learn routines and personality
Subject to date and location availability
items.footer_note: Because special moments are better enjoyed when you know your pet is safe, calm, and cared for.

items.name: Baths & Grooming
items.description: We help keep your pet clean, fresh, and comfortable with our bathing and hygiene services.
items.detail: A complete hygiene service so your furry friend is always presentable and healthy.
items.note: Fee depends on breed and size
conditions: Price varies by breed, size, and coat condition

certifications.title: My Certifications
certifications.subtitle: Professional training that backs every service I offer

items.name: Veterinary Assistant
items.description: Training in basic care, medication administration, first aid, and clinical animal handling.

items.name: Certified Groomer
items.description: Professional canine grooming: baths, cuts, brushing, ear cleaning, and coat care.

items.name: Animal First Aid
items.description: Emergency response training: animal CPR, poisoning management, and patient stabilization.

about.title: Hi, I'm Anais
about.subtitle: Your ally in pet care
about.description: I'm passionate about animal welfare, trained as a Veterinary Assistant and certified Groomer. I believe every pet deserves care as special as the love you give at home — that's why I work with one pet at a time.
about.description2: My home is their home. Walks, playtime, cuddles, and daily photo reports so you can enjoy your trip knowing your furry friend is happy too.

requirements.title: What we need to know
requirements.subtitle: To care for your pet as they deserve, we ask for some basic requirements

items.title: Up-to-date vaccines
items.description: Parvovirus, distemper, hepatitis, and rabies. We'll need to see the vet records.

items.title: Dewormed
items.description: Internal and external antiparasitic treatment current. Preferably no more than 3 months old.

items.title: Their own food
items.description: Bring your pet's food so we don't change their diet and cause any discomfort.

items.title: Friendly temperament
items.description: We don't accept pets with a history of aggression. Everyone's safety comes first.

items.title: Advance booking
items.description: At least 2-3 weeks in advance to ensure availability.

items.title: Meet & greet
items.description: We do a free introductory visit so your pet can get familiar with me and the space.

booking.title: Book your visit
booking.subtitle: Tell us about your pet and we'll find the perfect service

gallery.title: Special moments
gallery.subtitle: Real photos of the furry friends who have stayed with us

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before trusting me with your pet

items.q: How many pets do you care for at once?
items.a: Only one pet at a time. This ensures 100% personalized attention and a stress-free experience for your furry friend.

items.q: What does the boarding service include?
items.a: Daily walks, feeding according to their routine, playtime, constant companionship, and daily photo reports so you can stay worry-free.
Yes. I have training as a Veterinary Assistant, so I can safely administer oral, topical, and injectable medications.
In Medellín. I offer transportation service at an additional cost to pick up and deliver your pet.

items.q: How far in advance should I book?
items.a: At least 2-3 weeks in advance to ensure availability, especially during peak seasons.

items.q: Do you do a meet and greet?
items.a: Yes, and it's free. Before the first stay, we do a meet and greet visit so your pet can get comfortable with me and the space.

items.q: What happens in case of a veterinary emergency?
items.a: I have trusted veterinary clinics nearby. My training helps me identify warning signs and act quickly. I always contact you immediately.
